operation_mapping.navigate_page: Use host browsing tools to open 1688 or mirror pages
operation_mapping.read_visible_content: Use host page-reading tools only on visible page content
operation_mapping.open_supplier_or_product_link: Follow shortlisted supplier and product links inside the same browsing session
operation_mapping.write_markdown_report: Write a supplier-first Markdown report as the final artifact

notes: validated partial means mirror-assisted evidence has been proven, not direct 1688 support
